HomePage.badge: New: Chat with GPT-4.1 for free
HomePage.headline: Unlock the power of
HomePage.subheadline: Experience the next generation of AI chat. Seamlessly switch between models, analyze documents, and boost your productivity with Niato AI.
HomePage.whyChooseSub: Built for developers, creators, and professionals who need reliable AI assistance.

multiModel.title: Multi-Model Support
multiModel.desc: Access GPT-4, Claude 3, and Gemini Pro all in one unified interface.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.desc: Optimized for speed with streaming responses and low latency edge computing.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.desc: Your data is encrypted. We prioritize your privacy and data security.

context.title: Smart Context
context.desc: Advanced context management allows for longer, more coherent conversations.

history.title: Chat History
history.desc: Save, organize, and search through your past conversations effortlessly.

code.title: Code Highlighting
code.desc: Beautiful syntax highlighting for over 100 programming languages.

freePlan.a: Yes! You can use our basic models for free forever. Upgrade only when you need access to premium models like GPT-4.

credits.q: How does the credit system work?
credits.a: We use a simple pay-as-you-go system for premium models. You only pay for what you use, with no hidden monthly fees.

cancel.a: Absolutely. There are no long-term contracts. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to supercharge your productivity?
ctaFinal.desc: Join thousands of users who are already using Niato AI to work smarter, not harder.

Support.title: Support Center
Support.subtitle: Need help? Send us your request or report an issue.

form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Your request has been sent successfully.

Support.footer: We strive to respond to all requests within 24-48 hours.

trust.title: Your data is secure
trust.desc: We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your data with the utmost care. Your personal information is encrypted and stored securely.

acceptance.title: 1.1 Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Niato AI, you agree to be bound by these terms of service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

list.legal: Use the service in a legal and ethical manner
list.security: Not attempt to bypass security measures
list.illegal: Not use the service for illegal or harmful activities
list.confidentiality: Maintain the confidentiality of your login credentials

ip.title: 1.3 Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content, features, and technologies of Niato AI are the exclusive property of Niato AI and are protected by intellectual property laws.

liability.title: 1.4 Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Niato AI is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of the service.

collection.title: 2.1 Data Collection
collection.intro: We collect the following types of data:

usage.title: 2.2 Data Usage

list.communication: Communicate with you regarding your account

usage.important: Important: We never sell your personal data to third parties.

encryption.title: 🔒 Encryption
encryption.desc: All data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS) and at rest

protection.title: 🛡️ Protection
protection.desc: Secure authentication and protection against unauthorized access

access.title: 🔐 Access Control
access.desc: Access limited to data by authorized personnel only

monitoring.title: 📊 Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Continuous monitoring to detect suspicious activities

rights.title: 2.4 Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:

list.access: Right of access: Obtain a copy of your personal data
list.rectification: Right of rectification: Correct your inaccurate data
list.erasure: Right of erasure: Request deletion of your data
list.portability: Right to portability: Receive your data in a structured format
list.objection: Right to object: Object to the processing of your data
list.restriction: Right to restriction: Limit the processing of your data

rights.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us via the <link>support page</link>.

contact.title: Questions?
contact.desc: If you have questions regarding these terms or our privacy policy, please feel free to contact us.
